test.note: 223 tests passed across 16 test files. Maildev was started before running tests. All notification email tests (VAL-NOTIF-004, VAL-NOTIF-006, VAL-NOTIF-007, VAL-NOTIF-003, hold-expiration-email) now pass because Maildev is running on port 1025.

typecheck.note: Biome check passed with no issues.

lint.note: Biome lint check passed with no issues.

blockingIssues.description: Handoff references wrong commit: The handoff for end-to-end-validation (polish milestone) references commitId '191c22c' which is titled 'test: user testing validation for audit-trail milestone' and adds files to .factory/validation/audit-trail/ and evidence/audit-trail/. This commit does not contain any polish milestone or cross-area validation evidence (VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005).
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: The actual validation work was performed by the worker (browser automation, capacity tests, typecheck/lint), but the evidence was committed to the wrong milestone. The orchestrator should either: (1) Update the handoff to reference the correct commit containing polish cross-area validation evidence, or (2) Have the worker re-commit the polish validation evidence to the correct location.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that tests require Maildev to be running as a dependency. The test command works correctly with --maxWorkers=1 but workers should be aware to start Maildev first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 3 showed 6 tests failing due to Maildev not running. This round shows all 223 tests passing when Maildev is started first.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fix-test-infrastructure correctly resolved: The --maxWorkers=1 flag in vitest script prevents SQLite locking. All 223 tests pass when Maildev is running.
sharedStateObservations.reason: This was a known infrastructure issue from round 3 that is now resolved.
